name: Fart School RPG
description: ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+ RPG of a school where everybody, teachers, students, bullies fart all the time, will the player survive the gassy bullies and popular girls, or will they fall victim to the farty teachers and staff? Every character in this story farts all the time like it's normal and everybody has their own way to fart, unique to them as a form of self expression and communication.
creator: Ryan, shit eater
